info.description: ALEXZA AI API - Run actions, manage projects, webhooks, analytics, audit logs.
info.name: ALEXZA AI

description.content: Authentication
Execute AI actions

Execute a saved action by project ID and action name.
Validates input against the action's inputSchema, runs via ALEXZA Managed Runtime,
logs usage, and deducts credits.

variable.description: (Required) Name of the action to run

description.content:
Deprecated. Use `POST /v1/projects/{projectId}/run/{actionName}` for action-based execution.
Single-input legacy endpoint.
Responses include `X-Alexza-Deprecated: true` and `X-Alexza-Replacement: /v1/projects/:projectId/run/:actionName`.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Returns projects the user owns or has workspace access to.
